Name: Gagan Dhawan
Brief overview of research:
Professor, Dean & Registrar (Additional Charge) - Allied Medical Sciences at DSEU Dwarka Campus (formerly known as Integrated Institute of Technology, Dwarka)
MBA – Strategic Management and Entrepreneurship, School of Business and Technology, Washington DC, USA
Post Doctorate- Biological and Medicinal Chemistry, University of Massachusetts, Boston, USA
PhD- Biomedical Science, CSIR-IGIB and University of Delhi, Delhi
MS- Bioinformatics, University of Edinburgh, Scotland, UK
MSc- Biomedical Science, ACBR, University of Delhi, Delhi
BSc (Hons)- Chemistry, KMC, University of Delhi, Delhi.


Professor Gagan Dhawan did his graduation and post-graduation from University of Delhi, India. He was the recipient of the CSIR-Catch Them Young Award twice during his post-graduation in Biomedical Science under HRD for Biomedical Research: CSIR-University Interaction Model. He joined Ranbaxy Research Laboratories (Preclinical Pharmacokinetics and Metabolism Division) as a Research Chemist. After a few months, his interest in teaching attracted him to join the Department of Biomedical Science, Acharya Narendra Dev College, University of Delhi in August 2000. He did his doctorate from CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology, Delhi.

He was awarded Universitas 21 Fellowship to pursue Master’s in Bioinformatics from the University of Edinburgh, Scotland, UK. He was also invited as Visiting Faculty (August, 2011) at Laboratoire de Chimie des Polymères Organiques (LCPO), University of Bordeaux, France. He also visited Structural Biology Group, University of Edinburgh, UK (June, 2012) and Bradley Research Group, School of Chemistry, University of Edinburgh, UK (June, 2013) as Visiting Scientist.

Further, he is recipient of the prestigious UGC-Raman Award to pursue Post-Doctoral Research at Department of Chemistry, University of Massachusetts, Boston, USA for a period of 12 months (2016-17). Besides research, he was also involved in teaching organic chemistry as adjunct faculty at University of Massachusetts, Boston. He has published his research in various reputed journals and delivered invited talks in India and abroad.

He was also awarded with the prestigious “Strada Scholarship for Emerging Leaders-2021” with 100% fee waiver and completed his MBA with specializations in Strategic Leadership, Strategic Thinking and Entrepreneurship.in 2023 from School of Business and Technology, Washington DC, USA (March, 2023).

He is an elected Fellow of Indian Chemical Society (FICS) and Chartered Chemist (CChem) and Fellow of Royal Society of Chemistry (FRSC), London, UK. He is also a proud member of National Network of Mathematical and Computational Biology (NNMCB) funded by Science and Engineering Research Board, Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, to provide training to students in mathematical and computational biology and to promote research activities. He is selected as IoE Fellow at Delhi School of Skill Enhancement & Entrepreneurship Development (DSSEED), Institution of Eminence, University of Delhi.

Considering his contribution to teaching excellence, he received the Meritorious Teacher Award-2014, by the Directorate of Higher Education, Government of NCT of Delhi, India and INSA Teachers Award-2020 by the Indian National Science Academy, Government of India.

His research interest focuses on:
– Identification and optimization of novel inhibitors against therapeutic drug targets using in silico screening and chemical synthesis and development of comprehensive tools for the same to aid in drug discovery process.

– Design and development of natural polymer based smart self-assembled nanostructures for biomedical applications.

Dr. Ranbir Singh Sharma has more than 20 years of teaching experience. Name: Prof. (Dr.) Shruti Tripathi
Brief overview of research:
Campus Director - Business Administration Department ,School of Employability and Holistic Development & School of Innovation and Entrepreneurship Delhi Skills and Entrepreneurship University, Delhi at Kasturba DSEU Pitampura Campus (formerly known as Kasturba Institute of Technology, Pitampura)
PhD, Department of Commerce, University of Allahabad (2009).
UGC NET Labour Welfare/Personnel Management/Industrial Relations/ Labour and Social Welfare/ Human Resource Management (June 2012).
MBA (HR), University of Gorakhpur, Gorakhpur.
B.Sc.: Botany, Chemistry, University of Gorakhpur, Gorakhpur.

Dr. Tripathi comes with more than two decades of experience in teaching, training, research, partnerships, and consultation. She is sufficiently accomplished in establishing international academic standards at the university level. She is now serving as a Founding Professor to establish the SOEHD and launch SEL as a core course cutting across different semesters and programs of DSEU in alignment with NEP 2020. She is also Nodal Project In-Charge of the Village Adoption Program under “Rajypal Vikas ke Rajdoot Campaign”.
She serves as an External Advisor, DAB at Project & Monitoring Division, NCERT from 2021-2024. She is also part of the Advisory Committee of NCERT to implement GCED and ESD as part of the curriculum in all the classes (from class 1 to class 12) across India. She is a Ph.D. from the University of Allahabad; NET qualified and has a first-class academic career.
Her work experience includes teaching/training online/offline of Class IV employees to Class I level officers (Police officers, District Administration Officials, etc.), Ph.D. Scholars, principals of colleges, PSU officials, CWG volunteers, defense personnel, Students of Pan-African Countries, corporates, and trade union leaders, apart from regular PG/UG level students.

Her research interests include Quality Of Life, Sustainable Development, Quality of Work-life, Global Citizenship, emerging issues of management and technology like the impact of diversity and digitalization, change in societal values on career decisions etc. Her other areas of interest include emotional intelligence, leadership, innovative work practices, social audits, attrition etc. She has presented/written more than 50 research papers in International and National journals of repute. She also has a patent in the area of CRM.

Name: Sahil Koul
Brief overview of research:

Dr. Sahil Koul has 2 years of teaching experience and 10 years of industry experience. Formerly, he has worked with the FITT, Indian Institute of Technology – Delhi as a Senior Manager where he was responsible for product development of the mechanical engineering focused innovations. He has also worked on several exciting projects at the Extang Corporation, an automotive accessory manufacturer located in the USA.

His research interests are in interdisciplinary areas that include driverless car technology, new product development, technology acceptance, emerging automotive material trends, quality management and leadership. He has published papers in peer-reviewed journals, presented at international conferences, and also serves as a reviewer for several international journals.

Dr Koul is certified in CATIA, AutoCAD, Robotic Handling Tool Operation/Programming and Lean Manufacturing.
